details.question: Sur les 7 derniers jours, quelles sont les 5 ressources les plus touchees ?
details.sql: SELECT OBJECT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) GROUP BY OBJECT_NAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Sur les 30 derniers jours, combien de personnes differentes ont ete actives ?
details.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DBUSERNAME) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-30);

details.question: Sur EMPLOYEES, qui a fait la derniere operation observee ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE OBJECT_NAME='EMPLOYEES' ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Hier, qui a modifie des comptes utilisateurs ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='ALTER USER' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Montre les 10 dernieres operations de SYS sur DEVICE_ADDRESS.
details.sql: SELECT EVENT_TIMESTAMP, ACTION_NAME, DBUSERNAME FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE OBJECT_NAME='DEVICE_ADDRESS' ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Ce mois-ci, quels sont les 5 postes les plus actifs ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP,'MM')=TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Sur les 14 derniers jours, combien de changements de droits ont ete faits ?
details.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='GRANT' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-14);

details.question: Pendant les 2 dernieres semaines, quelles ressources ont ete creees ou supprimees ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME IN ('DROP TABLE','DROP USER','ALTER TABLE','ALTER USER','CREATE USER','GRANT','REVOKE') AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Sur les 7 derniers jours, quelles sont les 5 personnes qui se sont le plus connectees ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='LOGON' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Sur les 48 dernieres heures, quelles ressources ont eu le plus de changements ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-6) GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 48 ROWS ONLY;
